overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open grassland with mountains in the background. A rider on horseback passes by in the middle of the clip. The scene features high-quality game engine graphics with natural lighting and detailed vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through rolling green hills toward distant mountains

entered.detail: large solitary oak tree standing on the left hillside
snow-capped mountain range visible on the horizon
winding dirt trail with visible wagon wheel ruts
tall green grass covering the rolling hills

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grassland under a clear blue sky. A solitary tree stands on the left hillside while mountains rise in the distant background. The environment is peaceful and empty.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with approaching rider

events.description: horse rider appears in the distance approaching on the path
rider on horseback passes by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a horse rider approaches from ahead and passes by

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse toward the camera along the trail, then passing by on the right side

entered.detail: tall tree with dense foliage on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a rider on horseback appears in the distance and approaches along the trail. The rider passes by on the right side at close proximity. The solitary tree on the left grows larger as the camera approaches it.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the grassland, passing the solitary tree

entered.detail: cluster of trees appearing on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: After the rider passes, the character continues along the trail, moving past the solitary tree which falls behind to the left. New trees come into view on both sides of the path as the journey continues through the open grassland toward the distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail through an open grassland that transitions from a solitary landscape to a more wooded path. It begins with the character walking under a clear blue sky, passing a single tree on a hillside with distant mountains framing the horizon. As the journey continues, a rider on horseback appears in the distance and approaches, passing closely on the right while the solitary tree looms larger in the frame. The scene then shifts as the character moves past the lone tree, leaving it behind to the left. Finally, the open terrain gives way to new clusters of trees appearing on both sides of the path as the camera advances further toward the mountains.
